content: We can reframe curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A on autonomous agents) as a built-in active memory pruning and prioritization system for cutting-edge 2024-2025 long-context agent memory architectures. This creates a self-sustaining cycle where an agent’s innate curiosity automatically weeds out low-information redundant memory entries and elevates under-explored, high-surprise memory content that drives further active learning.
